confirmedRules: AES key and IV are 16 decimal ASCII digits used directly as bytes
AES mode is CBC with PKCS7 padding
s=seq+encryptedData.length where encryptedData is the Base64 string before URL encoding
RSA chunk size for sign is 53 bytes

currentDriverStatus.previousFailure: Older driver versions failed first with HTTP 403 INVALID_CREDENTIALS because h was implemented incorrectly, then failed again after login because the decrypted stok shape and sysauth cookie forwarding were implemented incorrectly
currentDriverStatus.currentObservedBehavior: Live validation on 2026-07-07 with the real credential admin succeeded in both login and authenticated status read against the real Archer C6 unit
currentDriverStatus.likelyInterpretation: The current driver is aligned with the real hardware for login plus authenticated read of admin/status?form=all

credentialFinding.note: The real credential used during live validation was supplied out of band by the device owner and is not persisted here.
